## Summary

Describe the change and the PACKET surface it affects.

## Claim Boundary

- [ ] This change preserves evidence labels, scale labels, market labels, and source custody.
- [ ] No engineering, RF, optical, regulatory, build-plan, advocacy, endorsement, funding, procurement, compliance, ROI, or validation claim is introduced unless explicitly source-backed and reviewed.
- [ ] Any changed public claim has a traceable source path or is marked held/source-needed/confidence-limited.

## Validation

```powershell
git diff --check -- README.md docs .github CONTRIBUTING.md
```
